title: Sweet & Dense Filipino Potato Stir-fry
description: A sweet and dense Filipino potato dish featuring russet potatoes, seasoned with a mediterranean blend to create an indulgent yet healthy twist on the traditional recipe.

ingredients.name: Mediterranean Blend Seasoning (Olive Oil, Lemon Juice, Dijon Mustard, Parsley)

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (205°C). Wash and peel the russet potatoes. Cut them into small bite-sized pieces.
Arrange potato pieces in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle with olive oil, add Mediterranean blend seasoning, coconut sugar, salt, and pepper. Toss to coat evenly.
Roast for 15 minutes, then reduce heat to 375°F (190°C) and continue roasting until potatoes are golden brown and slightly crispy on the outside, about 20-25 more minutes. Let cool slightly.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add extra virgin olive oil. Once hot, add minced garlic and sliced onion. Sauté for about 3 minutes or until onions turn translucent.
Stir in roasted potatoes, if using red bell pepper (if desired), and continue to stir-fry for another 5-7 minutes or until all ingredients are heated through and fragrant.
Season with additional salt and pepper if needed. Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
